records.question: Which template types where the description is CV have templates with version number exactly 9, effective from 1986-12-09 14:51:36 and effective to at least 1993-03-24 14:30:23?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT ref_template_types.template_type_code FROM ref_template_types
JOIN templates ON ref_template_types.template_type_code = templates.template_type_code
WHERE templates.version_number = 9 AND ref_template_types.template_type_description = 'CV' AND templates.date_effective_to >= '1993-03-24 14:30:23' AND templates.date_effective_from = '1986-12-09 14:51:36'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT ref_template_types.template_type_code
FROM ref_template_types
WHERE ref_template_types.template_type_description = 'CV'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM templates
    WHERE templates.template_type_code = ref_template_types.template_type_code
      AND templates.version_number = 9
      AND templates.date_effective_to >= '1993-03-24 14:30:23'
      AND templates.date_effective_from = '1986-12-09 14:51:36'
)

records.question: Which template types described as Paper have templates with version number exactly 5?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT ref_template_types.template_type_code FROM ref_template_types
JOIN templates ON ref_template_types.template_type_code = templates.template_type_code
WHERE ref_template_types.template_type_description = 'Paper' AND templates.version_number = 5
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Ref_Template_Types.Template_Type_Code
FROM Ref_Template_Types
WHERE Template_Type_Description = 'Paper'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Templates
    WHERE Templates.Template_Type_Code = Ref_Template_Types.Template_Type_Code
      AND Templates.Version_Number = 5
)

Which template types have a description that is exactly Presentation?

records.question: What template types are described as Book and have templates with version 2 that started on or before 1979-12-24 10:28:16 and ended exactly on 2000-10-22 11:57:12?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT ref_template_types.template_type_code FROM ref_template_types
JOIN templates ON ref_template_types.template_type_code = templates.template_type_code
WHERE ref_template_types.template_type_description = 'Book' AND templates.date_effective_from <= '1979-12-24 10:28:16' AND templates.date_effective_to = '2000-10-22 11:57:12' AND templates.version_number = 2
records.pred_sql:
SELECT ref_template_types.template_type_code
FROM ref_template_types
WHERE ref_template_types.template_type_description = 'Book'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM templates
    WHERE templates.template_type_code = ref_template_types.template_type_code
      AND templates.date_effective_from <= '1979-12-24 10:28:16'
      AND templates.date_effective_to = '2000-10-22 11:57:12'
      AND templates.version_number = 2
)

records.question: Which template types where the description is Paper have templates with version number exactly 5, date effective from on or before 2005-11-12 07:09:48, and date effective to exactly 2008-01-05 14:19:28?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT ref_template_types.template_type_code FROM ref_template_types
JOIN templates ON ref_template_types.template_type_code = templates.template_type_code
WHERE templates.date_effective_from <= '2005-11-12 07:09:48' AND templates.version_number = 5 AND ref_template_types.template_type_description = 'Paper' AND templates.date_effective_to = '2008-01-05 14:19:28'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Ref_Template_Types.Template_Type_Code
FROM Ref_Template_Types
WHERE Template_Type_Description = 'Paper'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Templates
    WHERE Templates.Template_Type_Code = Ref_Template_Types.Template_Type_Code
      AND Templates.Date_Effective_From <= '2005-11-12 07:09:48'
      AND Templates.Version_Number = 5
      AND Templates.Date_Effective_To = '2008-01-05 14:19:28'
)
